source_rationale: ADIPOQ (adiponectin) is a hallmark adipokine secreted exclusively by mature adipocytes

PPARGC1A is a transcriptional coactivator for thermogenesis in brown/beige adipocytes
CCDC3 is an adipocyte-enriched secreted protein
DPP6 is a potassium channel auxiliary subunit enriched in adipocyte precursors
PRKCH is a protein kinase C isoform expressed in adipocyte progenitors
AQP7 is an aquaglyceroporin essential for glycerol transport in adipocytes
RXRG is a nuclear receptor involved in adipocyte differentiation
RGS6 is a regulator of G-protein signaling enriched in smooth muscle/pericyte cells
FHOD3 is a formin involved in sarcomere assembly in cardiomyocyte-like cells
ALPK3 is a kinase associated with cardiomyopathy and cardiomyocyte function
MYH11 is a smooth muscle myosin heavy chain marker
ACTA2 is a smooth muscle actin marker
LMOD1 is a smooth muscle-specific actin-binding protein
GUCY1A3 is a soluble guanylate cyclase subunit in smooth muscle cells
TINAGL1 is an extracellular matrix protein enriched in pericytes/smooth muscle
CARMN is a smooth muscle-specific lncRNA
SYNPO2 is a smooth muscle-enriched cytoskeletal protein
DCN (decorin) is a proteoglycan highly expressed in fibroblasts
COL1A2 is a major fibrillar collagen produced by fibroblasts
COL1A1 is the most abundant collagen in fibroblasts
LUM (lumican) is a proteoglycan characteristic of fibroblasts
PDGFRA is a canonical fibroblast marker receptor
CFD (adipsin) is expressed in adipose-derived fibroblasts
CXCL12 (SDF-1) is a chemokine produced by stromal/fibroblast cells
THY1 (CD90) is a fibroblast surface marker
FBN1 (fibrillin-1) is an extracellular matrix glycoprotein produced by fibroblasts
FBLN1 (fibulin-1) is an ECM protein secreted by fibroblasts
MFAP5 is a microfibril-associated protein enriched in fibroblasts
APOD is an apolipoprotein highly expressed in fibroblasts
